title: 宝塚記念の後に・節目に立ちて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her intense race against Inari One, Mejiro
Ardan gets a strong sense that the audience's
evaluation of her is steadily shifting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the race now over, she and her cherished
rivals, Sakura Chiyono O and Yaeno Muteki,
congratulate each other's efforts.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The following day, Mejiro Ardan expresses her
desire to make competing against Oguri Cap her
goal. She wishes to find out whether she has what
it takes to compete with Oguri Cap in her current
condition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our sights firmly set on racing against Oguri
Cap in the autumn Tenno Sho, we decide on the
Mainichi Okan as a preliminary race and begin
our preparations.
